info.title: HogarClaro — Core API
info.description: Deterministic financial engine for HogarClaro. The LLM narrates; this API computes. All money math lives in app/core (Python, pytest-tested).

schema.title: Response List Plans Households  Household Id  Plans Get

get.description: List transactions for the household. Filter by month (YYYY-MM) or pocket.

schema.title: Response List Transactions Households  Household Id  Transactions Get

get.description: Plan vs actual deviation for the given month (YYYY-MM). Core: API-1.5/1.6.

post.description: Check if a proposed expense is feasible: green / amber / red + trade-off. Core: API-2.1.

get.description: Return debts ordered by avalanche strategy (highest rate first). Core: API-1.6.
Current leisure budget consumption: available, spent, caps. Core: API-2.2.

post.description: Archive the active plan, generate monthly report, and surface alerts. API-2.12/2.13.

get.description: Generate proactive budget alerts for the household for the current (or given) month. API-2.10.

schema.title: Response Get Alerts Households  Household Id  Alerts Get

post.description: Conversational agent: narrates, simulates, explains — never computes money. API-1.15.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.description: uid → bool; all True = proposed → active

SimulateRequest.title: SimulateRequest
SimulateRequest.description: Propose an out-of-plan expense; core returns traffic-light + trade-off.

sacrifice.title: Sacrifice
sacrifice.description: What gets deferred or reduced to fund this expense

fx.title: Fx
fx.description: Exchange rate at time of transaction
